zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles於1297年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Sir William Berkerolles22歲，母親Lady Phelice de Vere17歲。他於1332年與Catherine De Tuberville在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾巴薩利格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1351年11月11日在威爾士蒙姆爾巴薩利格享年54歲，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根巴里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles于1297年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Sir William Berkerolles22岁，母亲Lady Phelice de Vere17岁。他于1332年与Catherine De Tuberville在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾巴薩利格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1351年11月11日在威尔士蒙姆爾巴薩利格享年54岁，埋葬在威尔士格拉莫爾根巴里。

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles was born in 1297, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Berkerolles, was 22 and his mother, Lady Phelice de Vere, was 17. He married Catherine De Tuberville in 1332, in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 November 1351, in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 54, and was buried in Barry, Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles est né en 1297, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Berkerolles, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Phelice de Vere, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Catherine De Tuberville en 1332, à Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1351, à Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Barry, Glamorgan, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles 1297 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Berkerolles 22 und seine Mutter Lady Phelice de Vere 17. Er hat 1332 in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Catherine De Tuberville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1351 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Barry, Glamorgan, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles è nato il nel 1297 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Berkerolles, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lady Phelice de Vere, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Catherine De Tuberville nel 1332, nel Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1351, nel Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Barry, Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerollesが1297年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Sir William Berkerollesは22歳，母Lady Phelice de Vereは17歳であった。1332年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアバッサレグでCatherine De Tubervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1351年11月11日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアバッサレグで54歳で死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles(이)가 1297년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Berkerolles(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Phelice de Vere(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1332년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 배사일그에서 Catherine De Tuberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1351년 11월 11일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 배사일그에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건 배리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles nasceu em 1297, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Berkerolles, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Phelice de Vere, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine De Tuberville em 1332, em Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1351, em Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Barry, Glamorgan, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles родился в 1297 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Berkerolles было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Phelice de Vere, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine De Tuberville в 1332 г. в местности бассеилег, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 ноября 1351 г. в местности бассеилег, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности барри, глэморган, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles nació en 1297, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Berkerolles, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Phelice de Vere, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Catherine De Tuberville en 1332, en Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1351, en Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Barry, Glamorgan, Gales.
